descriptionHtml:
If you’re in the market for a comfortable and reliable catamaran, the Lagoon 400 S2 2016 For Sale is a great option. Designed for both cruising and live-aboard purposes, this particular vessel is a well-maintained and versatile yacht. She is currently located in the Lazio region of Italy and is in good condition. With a spacious interior, solid sailing performance, and practical features, this boat is ready to provide enjoyable journeys for her new owner.

Here are the detailed specifications for this Lagoon 400 S2 2016 For Sale :

General Information:

  • Builder: Lagoon
  • Model: Lagoon 400 S2
  • Year: 2016
  • Flag: Italian
  • Condition: Good, with regular maintenance
  • Length Overall (LOA): 11.97 m
  • Beam: 7.25 m
  • Draft: 1.21 m
  • Displacement: 10,350 kg
  • Number of Owners: 2
  • Passenger Capacity: 12
  • Registration Status: Registered
  • Location: Lazio, Italy

Exterior and Deck:

  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: Fibreglass (VTR)
  • Cockpit Teak: Yes
  • Cushions: Yes
  • Bimini Top: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes
  • Tender: Highfield 3.20m Hypalon with aluminium bottom
  • Anchoring System: Electric windlass, anchor, and chain included
  • Fenders: 7
  • Liferaft: Included, revised 2023

Interior:

  • Cabins:
    • 4 double cabins
    • 2 crew cabins
  • Berths: 10 (including 2 saloon berths)
  • Bathrooms: 5
  • Galley:
    • 3-burner stove
    • Oven
    • Refrigerator (1 indoor + 1 outdoor)
    • Dishwasher and microwave

Engine & Performance:

  • Engines: 2 Yanmar 4JH45 (inboard)
  • Power: 45 HP per engine
  • Year of Engines: 2016
  • Engine Hours: 4,000
  • Transmission: SD-60 sail drives
  • Propellers: Fixed blades
  • Fuel Capacity: 400 litres

Systems and Equipment:

  • Navigation Instruments:
    • Autopilot
    • VHF
    • Depth Gauge (ECO)
    • Log
    • Tridata
    • Compass
    • Wind Instruments
    • Plotter
  • Batteries:
    • 2 lithium service batteries (new in 2023)
    • Lead-acid engine battery
  • Water Tanks:
    • 2 tanks with a total capacity of 600 litres
    • Material: PVC
  • Hot Water Boiler: Yes
  • Shore Power Charger: Yes
  • Water Pump (Autoclave): Yes
  • Blackwater Tank: Yes
  • External Shower: Yes (on deck)

Rigging & Sails:

  • Winches: 4 Harken (3 main + 1 auxiliary)
  • Mainsail: Full-batten mainsail + spare mainsail
  • Headsail: Furling Genoa with roller furling system
  • Lazy Bag: Included

Notes:

  • This Lagoon 400 S2 2016 For Sale  has been maintained and kept in good condition by its previous owners, with particular care for its sails, engines, and onboard systems.
  • The boat includes updated safety equipment, with the life raft last serviced in 2023 for peace of mind.
  • Ideal for family use, cruising, or charter, offering the right balance between comfort and performance.

This Lagoon 400 S2 2016 For Sale  is a solid and practical choice for anyone looking for a well-equipped, spacious catamaran. If you’re seeking a vessel that’s ready for new adventures, this one may be the perfect match. For more information or to arrange a viewing, feel free to get in touch.
